description: Gasless cross-chain intent layer for AI agents: 22 EVM chains + Stellar, one signature, no gas.
name: io.github.ox31461/robyn

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Robyn gateway (gasless quote/route/execute API). Optional — defaults to https://api.anygas.xyz/svc.
environmentVariables.name: ROBYN_SVC

environmentVariables.description: Optional hex private key. If set, the server signs and submits gasless intents autonomously; if omitted, it returns unsigned intents for the agent/user to sign.
environmentVariables.name: ROBYN_SIGNER_KEY

title: Robyn — Gasless Cross-Chain for AI Agents
